endpoints.name: GET /accounts/authinfo

endpoints.description: Retrieves, inserts, updates, and deletes multiple Merchant Center (sub-)accounts in a single request.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /accountstatuses/batch
endpoints.description: Retrieves multiple Merchant Center account statuses in a single request.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /accounttax/batch
endpoints.description: Retrieves and updates tax settings of multiple accounts in a single request.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /datafeeds/batch
endpoints.description: Deletes, fetches, gets, inserts and updates multiple datafeeds in a single request.

endpoints.name: POST /datafeedstatuses/batch
endpoints.description: Gets multiple Merchant Center datafeed statuses in a single request.

endpoints.name: POST /liasettings/batch
endpoints.description: Retrieves and/or updates the LIA settings of multiple accounts in a single request.

endpoints.name: POST /orders/batch

endpoints.name: POST /pos/batch
endpoints.description: Batches multiple POS-related calls in a single request.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /products/batch
endpoints.description: Retrieves, inserts, and deletes multiple products in a single request.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /productstatuses/batch

endpoints.description: Updates a datafeed configuration of your Merchant Center account. Any fields that are not provided are deleted from the resource.

endpoints.description: Invokes a fetch for the datafeed in your Merchant Center account. If you need to call this method more than once per day, we recommend you use the Products service to update your product data.

endpoints.description: Lists the statuses of the datafeeds in your Merchant Center account.

endpoints.name: POST /{merchantId}/orderinvoices/{orderId}/createChargeInvoice
endpoints.description: Creates a charge invoice for a shipment group, and triggers a charge capture for orderinvoice enabled orders.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ORDERID}} with a real orderid. Replace {{MERCHANTID}} with a real merchantid.

endpoints.name: POST /{merchantId}/orderinvoices/{orderId}/createRefundInvoice
endpoints.description: Creates a refund invoice for one or more shipment groups, and triggers a refund for orderinvoice enabled orders. This can only be used for line items that have previously been charged using `createChargeInvoice`. All amounts (except for the summary) are incremental with respect to the previous invoice.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ORDERID}} with a real orderid. Replace {{MERCHANTID}} with a real merchantid.

endpoints.name: GET /{merchantId}/orderreports/disbursements
endpoints.description: Retrieves a report for disbursements from your Merchant Center account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MERCHANTID}} with a real merchantid.

endpoints.name: GET /{merchantId}/orderreports/disbursements/{disbursementId}/transactions
endpoints.description: Retrieves a list of transactions for a disbursement from your Merchant Center account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MERCHANTID}} with a real merchantid. Replace {{DISBURSEMENTID}} with a real disbursementid.

endpoints.name: GET /{merchantId}/orders
endpoints.description: Lists the orders in your Merchant Center account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MERCHANTID}} with a real merchantid.

endpoints.name: GET /{merchantId}/orders/{orderId}
endpoints.description: Retrieves an order from your Merchant Center account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ORDERID}} with a real orderid. Replace {{MERCHANTID}} with a real merchantid.

endpoints.name: POST /{merchantId}/orders/{orderId}/acknowledge
endpoints.description: Marks an order as acknowledged.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ORDERID}} with a real orderid. Replace {{MERCHANTID}} with a real merchantid.

endpoints.name: POST /{merchantId}/orders/{orderId}/cancel
endpoints.description: Cancels all line items in an order, making a full refund.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ORDERID}} with a real orderid. Replace {{MERCHANTID}} with a real merchantid.

endpoints.name: POST /{merchantId}/orders/{orderId}/cancelLineItem
endpoints.description: Cancels a line item, making a full refund.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ORDERID}} with a real orderid. Replace {{MERCHANTID}} with a real merchantid.

endpoints.name: POST /{merchantId}/orders/{orderId}/inStoreRefundLineItem
endpoints.description: Deprecated. Notifies that item return and refund was handled directly by merchant outside of Google payments processing (e.g. cash refund done in store). Note: We recommend calling the returnrefundlineitem method to refund in-store returns. We will issue the refund directly to the customer. This helps to prevent possible differences arising between merchant and Google transaction records. We also recommend having the point of sale system communicate with Google to ensure that customers do not receive a double refund by first refunding via Google then via an in-store return.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ORDERID}} with a real orderid. Replace {{MERCHANTID}} with a real merchantid.

endpoints.name: POST /{merchantId}/orders/{orderId}/refund
endpoints.description: Deprecated, please use returnRefundLineItem instead.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ORDERID}} with a real orderid. Replace {{MERCHANTID}} with a real merchantid.

endpoints.name: POST /{merchantId}/orders/{orderId}/rejectReturnLineItem
endpoints.description: Rejects return on an line item.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ORDERID}} with a real orderid. Replace {{MERCHANTID}} with a real merchantid.

endpoints.name: POST /{merchantId}/orders/{orderId}/returnLineItem
endpoints.description: Returns a line item.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ORDERID}} with a real orderid. Replace {{MERCHANTID}} with a real merchantid.

endpoints.name: POST /{merchantId}/orders/{orderId}/returnRefundLineItem
endpoints.description: Returns and refunds a line item. Note that this method can only be called on fully shipped orders. Please also note that the Orderreturns API is the preferred way to handle returns after you receive a return from a customer. You can use Orderreturns.list or Orderreturns.get to search for the return, and then use Orderreturns.processreturn to issue the refund. If the return cannot be found, then we recommend using this API to issue a refund.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ORDERID}} with a real orderid. Replace {{MERCHANTID}} with a real merchantid.

endpoints.name: POST /{merchantId}/orders/{orderId}/setLineItemMetadata
endpoints.description: Sets (or overrides if it already exists) merchant provided annotations in the form of key-value pairs. A common use case would be to supply us with additional structured information about a line item that cannot be provided via other methods. Submitted key-value pairs can be retrieved as part of the orders resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ORDERID}} with a real orderid. Replace {{MERCHANTID}} with a real merchantid.

endpoints.name: POST /{merchantId}/orders/{orderId}/shipLineItems
endpoints.description: Marks line item(s) as shipped.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ORDERID}} with a real orderid. Replace {{MERCHANTID}} with a real merchantid.

endpoints.name: POST /{merchantId}/orders/{orderId}/testreturn
endpoints.description: Sandbox only. Creates a test return.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ORDERID}} with a real orderid. Replace {{MERCHANTID}} with a real merchantid.

endpoints.description: Sandbox only. Retrieves an order template that can be used to quickly create a new order in sandbox.
